z{Recursivelly replace all typevars with those from `parameters`.
    Helper function for `_GenericAlias.__getitem__`.

clsr!
d"d#
d$d%d&
d'd(
d%d)
d*d+
d-d.
d0d1
d$d2d3
d4d5
d:d;
A python-based backport of the `types.GenericAlias` class.
    E.g. for ``t = list[int]``, ``t.__origin__`` is ``list`` and
    ``t.__args__`` is ``(int,)``.
    See Also
    --------
    :pep:`585`
        The PEP responsible for introducing `types.GenericAlias`.
    )
__weakref__
_origin
_args
_parameters
_hashr
super
__getattribute__
self
	__class__r!

Tuple[Any, ...]c
_GenericAlias.__args__z
Tuple[TypeVar, ...]c
z'Type variables in the ``GenericAlias``.r<
_GenericAlias.__parameters__r
None)

z-Tuple[Type[_T], Tuple[type, Tuple[Any, ...]]])

z!Check if an `obj` is an instance.z9isinstance() argument 2 cannot be a parameterized genericN
